ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Employee, Partner, Vendor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "parent_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent role (for hierarchical roles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_parent_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned the role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the role was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who assigned the role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the role assignment (e.g., Active, Pending, Revoked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* User ID of the department head */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_departments_head_of_department FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_department_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department assignment */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user assigned the department */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the department was assigned */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the department was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who assigned the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_department_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_department_assignments_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_department_assignments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES user_departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of contact (e.g., phone, email, address) */,
  "contact_value" TEXT /* Value of the contact */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the primary contact for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_contacts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, update, delete) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for device and browser information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_key" TEXT /* Key of the preference (e.g., language, theme) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
